title: Peltopus discolor
taxonomy: Peltopus discolor is classified as a species of sea cucumber, specifically belonging to the genus Peltopus of the family Pelopodidae. It is a type of marine invertebrate that belongs to the phylum Echinodermata. This classification places it within the larger group of animals known as deuterostomes. Further, Peltopus discolor is categorized within the kingdom Animalia. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other sea cucumbers and invertebrates.
